description_long: This is a rectangular, stone-like bathtub with thick, rugged walls and a deep basin. The exterior surface appears rough and uneven, giving it a hand-carved or natural stone appearance. The rim is broad and slightly irregular, suggesting a robust, utilitarian design. The interior is spacious, with a visible drainage hole at the bottom, and the corners are sharply defined. There are no visible plumbing fixtures or decorative elements on the exterior. The overall color is a dark, slate gray, consistent throughout the object.
description: A rugged, rectangular stone bathtub with a deep basin, rough exterior, and a visible drainage hole. The surface is dark gray and unadorned, with thick, sturdy walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, rectangular opening and thick, rough rim with a deep basin.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the basin and the thickness of the stone walls.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the rectangular shape and rough texture.
description_view_3: End view showing the square profile and the drainage hole at the bottom center.

license_info.creator_display_name: Santa Cruz Museum of Art and History
